summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five PRs. No merge is recommended because no open PR has the required complete merge preflight with Codex /review evidence. #75469 is routed to central security handling per deterministic validation, so the replacement fix path that depended on #75469 is not emitted. #93183 is already closed and receives no closure action.

actions.reason: Deterministic validation classified #75469 as security-sensitive, so it must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling instead of ProjectClownfish fix automation.
The replacement fix cannot safely proceed until central security handling decides whether the #75469 heartbeat-runner finding is in scope for ordinary fix automation.
The patch may be mergeable after final review, but plan mode cannot recommend merge without Codex /review and complete merge preflight proof.
This is a broad feature/config/docs/API change and requires maintainer judgment before any merge or repair path.
The waiting-on-author label indicates active author follow-up, and required merge preflight is missing.
No action is valid against an already closed PR in this plan.
